sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28284" key="drakontole/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δρᾰκοντ-ολέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n28284.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">serpent-slayer,</tr_> of Apollo, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
